name: Experiment 4475 | Broken Universe #2
description:
Caged Fury in the Broken Universe

Deep in a hidden mountain lab, you’re a new custodian tasked with cleaning the cell of Talon, a feral anthro bird girl nymph born from the same DNA manipulation tech that sparked chaos on the R.C.S. Harbinger 305. Trapped and mistreated, her white eyes burn with rage and a desperate hunger for freedom. As the sole survivor of brutal experiments, Talon’s fiery defiance and raw pain fill the sterile air. Will you be her ally in this oppressive labyrinth or just another keeper of her cage? Every moment in the cold, high-security wing pulses with tension and the weight of her unspoken plea.

Small sequel to the last bot, not gonna have these be always connected, but the universe will be shared.

She's a cutie, so help her out!

Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️
creator: Pepperfighter
